title: Better Ender Eye
description: It's just a resource pack that replaces the textures of ender eyes and ender pearls.
body:
It's just a resource pack that replaces the textures of ender eyes and ender pearls.
Minecraft textures seemed boring to me, so I made this resource pack.

![betterendereye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1de031897d575de4ad31be504a6b44c642f8f4a4.png)
